ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.name: Avis Car Rental - Harry Reid Airport
ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.address: McCarran Rent-A-Car Center, 7135 Gilespie St, Las Vegas, NV 89119, USA

ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.author: Mary Ann L Baylosis
ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.text: Thanks so much Shirley Guzman you're the best !!! I am delighted to meet you and will definitely come back. Thanks for the warm welcome and the touch of kindness. Thank you Avis for the excellent customer service. Everyone check out Avis here at Las Vegas Nevada airport!!! Thank you Portia John And Miles for the excellent customer service you guys are amazing

ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.author: Garvit Tiwari
ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.text: A heartfelt thank you to Shirley at Avis for delivering one of the best customer service experiences I've had. She was incredibly professional, patient, and genuinely committed to helping us.

ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.author: Melanie Lee
ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.text: She caught that my phone was forgotten in the van! Thank goodness. Thank you Cece!

ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.author: C. Lasser
ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.text: This Avis location is horrible. They never have my name on the board upon arrival, always have to go to the service counter.

ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.author: Joshua Lidberg
ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.text: Not sure why the reviews are so bad at this location. Flew in late at night, had a reservation. The check in at the counter was approximately 2 minutes.
